title: Spartan Weaponry: Ice and Fire
description: Addon mod for Spartan Weaponry that adds compatibility with Ice and Fire.
body:
**
Adds new [Ice and Fire](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons) themed weapons and traits to [Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry).
** **
Based on cbkovak's [Spartan and Fire](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spartan-and-fire) for 1.12.2.
** ![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/31541291/167636045-658a77d5-6af9-4af8-a819-03fd8ed41d5c.png) ### Supported materials: - **Dragon Bone** - **Flamed Dragon Bone** - Ice Dragon Damage Bonus II - +8.0 damage against Ice Dragons - Flamed I - Ignites and knocks back foes - **Iced Dragon Bone** - Fire Dragon Damage Bonus II - +8.0 damage against Fire Dragons - Iced I - Freezes foes for 10 seconds - **Lightning Dragon Bone** - Ice Dragon Damage Bonus I - +4.0 damage against Ice Dragons - Fire Dragon Damage Bonus I - +4.0 damage against Fire Dragons - Shocked - Strikes foes with lightning - **Desert Myrmex Chitin** - Non-arthropod Damage Bonus - +4.0 damage against non-arthropods and Death Worms - **Desert Myrmex Stinger** - Non-arthropod Damage Bonus - +4.0 damage against non-arthropods and Death Worms - Poisoned - Poisons foes for 10 seconds - **Jungle Myrmex Chitin** - Non-arthropod Damage Bonus - +4.0 damage against non-arthropods and Death Worms - **Jungle Myrmex Stinger** - Non-arthropod Damage Bonus - +4.0 damage against non-arthropods and Death Worms - Poisoned - Poisons foes for 10 seconds - **Fire Dragonsteel** - Flamed II - Ignites and knocks back foes - **Ice Dragonsteel** - Iced II - Freezes foes for 15 seconds - **Lightning Dragonsteel** - Shocked - Strikes foes with lightning ### Planned Updates: - Backport newer features to 1.16.5 - Backport to 1.12.2 to support [Ice and Fire: RotN Edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ice-and-fire-rotn-edition)'s lightning weapons and fix any bugs along the way
**
Get yourself a server with 15% off the first month at Kinetic Hosting with code KRELOX
** [![Kinetic Hosting Banner](https://onedrive.live.com/embed?resid=6BF544900F9867AE%2113808&authkey=%21AJZMCAdCdWoTprs&width=900&height=194)](https://tinyurl.com/kreloxkinetic)
